description_long: This is a modern, boxy two-story house with a flat roof and a rooftop terrace. The front features a gated driveway with space for two cars, a small green lawn, and a balcony above the entryway. The exterior is predominantly white with large windows, some of which are arranged asymmetrically, and there are several potted plants and trees around the property. The rooftop area includes a glass-covered section, likely a skylight or sunroom, and an open terrace with outdoor furniture. The rear and side facades are more minimal, with fewer windows and a clean, geometric appearance. The house is surrounded by a low fence and landscaping, giving it a contemporary urban feel.
description: A modern, two-story white house with a flat roof, rooftop terrace, gated driveway, and asymmetrical windows, surrounded by greenery and a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gated driveway, main entrance, balcony, and rooftop terrace with visible outdoor furniture.
description_view_1: Side view dominated by a blank white wall, with the driveway and cars partially visible, and landscaping on both ends.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the green lawn, minimal windows, and a tree, with the rooftop structure visible above.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the open carport, supporting columns, and more of the rooftop terrace and landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with a mix of small and large windows
attribute_entryway_design: Gated driveway with a recessed main door, balcony above, and minimal decorative elements
